description:
Sync meeting notes, key points, and action items to Salesforce contact or opportunity records. Automatically associate meetings with the right account based on attendee email domains.

**Rationale:** Sales teams generate high volumes of meetings — automatically enriching CRM records with meeting intelligence eliminates manual note entry and improves pipeline visibility.
title: Salesforce CRM Meeting Sync
